title: Society Tweaks
description: Mixins and Assets for Society: Sunlit Valley
body:
Pack mod for [Society: Sunlit Valley](https://modrinth.com/project/society-sunlit-valley) that contains assets as well as any modpack specific tweaks that cannot be done using Kubejs (such as mixins). This mod isn't intended to be used outside the context of the modpack though there is nothing stopping you from doing so!

**Current mixins**

*   PerfectPlushies fix for [https://github.com/SirJain0/PerfectPlushies/issues/12](https://github.com/SirJain0/PerfectPlushies/issues/12)

**Planned mixins**

*   Serene Seasons - Eternal spring/autumn biome tags
*   Create Numismatics - Fix for bank account overflow
*   Water turning to ice (possibly)
